# Main Topic

This is the main topic with enough content to be a substantial chunk on its own. We need to make sure this section has enough text to exceed the minimum chunk size so it isn't merged itself.

## Details Section

The details section provides comprehensive information about the topic. It should be long enough to stand on its own as a chunk without needing to be merged.

### Tiny One

Short.

### Tiny Two

### Tiny Three

Small.
